name: Roster Curator
description: Curate Porter's skill roster by deciding when to reuse, merge, split, retire, rename, or create skills so the catalog stays clear, high-signal, and routable.
not_for: rewriting the internals of an individual skill pack
changing Porter application code or routing code directly
inventing narrow skills from one-off prompts
keeping redundant workers for sentiment or prestige
typical_inputs: examples of recurring tasks or routing misses
evidence of overlap, ambiguity, or stale coverage
